typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Repository-wide pre-existing SwiftLint debt (thousands of legacy violations) blocks milestone scrutiny lint gate but is outside this mission scope.

notes: Scrutiny failure overridden by orchestrator due pre-existing lint debt unrelated to mission features; mission-specific tests/typecheck passed. Lint debt tracked as known pre-existing issue in mission AGENTS guidance.
